source_files.pdf: Generated `specs.md` from official manufacturer URLs previously stored in `pdf.txt`
source_files.finance: Generated from official Chevrolet pricing and finance pages

finance_snapshot.total_before_tax: Chevrolet.com lists a starting price of $32,400 before destination freight charge, taxes, title, license, registration, dealer fees, and optional equipment.
finance_snapshot.apr: Chevrolet financing and lease programs vary by model, region, term, and approved credit; check Chevrolet current offers, special offers, and GM Financial for current programs.
finance_snapshot.finance_payment: Use Chevrolet shopping tools, dealer quotes, or GM Financial resources for current monthly payment estimates.
finance_snapshot.finance_down_payment: Varies by approved credit, taxes, fees, incentives, trade value, and deal structure.
finance_snapshot.lease_payment: Lease estimates vary by trim, region, mileage allowance, and current official Chevrolet programs.
finance_snapshot.due_at_signing: Varies by taxes, fees, first payment, incentives, and retailer structure.
finance_snapshot.incentives: Chevrolet current offers and special offers can change frequently and should be confirmed locally.
finance_snapshot.warranty: See Chevrolet owner manuals and support resources for current warranty, maintenance, and ownership details.
finance_snapshot.best_for: Truck shoppers who want Chevy pickup utility without moving into full-size cost and footprint.
finance_snapshot.financial_strengths: Midsize-truck pricing and capability can be easier to justify than a full-size pickup for many buyers.
finance_snapshot.financial_concerns: Well-equipped midsize trucks can get expensive fast and approach full-size payment territory.
finance_snapshot.notes: Snapshot uses Chevrolet pricing and official finance pages on March 26, 2026.

image_strategy.note: Dataset stores one canonical local image per vehicle. Source image alt: 2026 Chevrolet Colorado
